default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on template page categories and content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Template Page Categories:** Megan will confirm engineering capacity for adding template categories to the site. The categories will be based on the "SEO plan sheet" to align with user search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Content Performance:** Guides are driving significant SEO growth (impressions up 13x vs. Nov), but templates are more effective at converting traffic into subscribers.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**Reporting Gaps:** The Looker dashboard doesn't clearly show conversion impact per content type. Megan will update it to combine SEO and conversion metrics on one chart for easier analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**Production Increase:** Template production will double from 5 to 10/week starting Jan 26 to capitalize on their higher conversion rate. Guide production is at 4/day this week, scaling to 5/day next week.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Reporting

  - [**SEO Growth:** Guide production is driving strong SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [Impressions are up 13x in January vs. November.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [Clicks and impressions show significant growth since late December.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Conversion Effectiveness:** Templates are more effective than guides at converting traffic into subscribers.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [This insight, which was not immediately clear from the Looker dashboard, was discovered by Sam via separate analysis combining data from Looker and PowerGA.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**Reporting Gaps:** The current Looker dashboard doesn't clearly show conversion impact per content type.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [**Required View:** A single chart showing SEO metrics (e.g., clicks) alongside a down-funnel metric (e.g., purchases, sign-ups) to directly link traffic to business outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
      - [**AEO Tracking:** The dashboard also lacks a clear view of how guides impact AI search (AEO).](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
          - [**Current Method:** GrowthX tracks AEO share-of-voice against competitors (e.g., Replit) using Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
          - [**New Initiative:** A "prompt gap analysis" is underway to identify prompts where competitors rank but Lovable doesn't, informing new content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

### Template Page Categories

  - [**Goal:** Add categories to the template page to improve user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Megan will confirm if GrowthX engineering can handle the work.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The feature may be simpler to implement than it seems, as some backend categorization already exists but is not visible on the frontend.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [If GrowthX cannot prioritize it, Lovable's team will add it to their work log.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [**Category Source:** The "SEO plan sheet" document will be the source for categories.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These categories are based on keyword research and align with user search intent, creating a foundation for SEO hub pages.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
          - [**App Templates:** Operations, HR, Sales, Product Management](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
          - [**Website Templates:** Business Services, Shopping, Creative, Community](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [Confirm engineering capacity for template categories and provide a timeline by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Share the "SEO plan sheet" with the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard to combine SEO and conversion metrics on one chart.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [**Sam:**](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Request the "SEO plan sheet" from Tom to share with Megan.](https://fathom.video/share/fbC5LuqCy2wt1sPfhjhsK88RuxbSPyZW?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

action_items.description: Confirm w/ GrowthX eng on template categories; send ETA to Sam/Johanna; if blocked, ask Tom/Olivia to log
Email Tom re: SEO plan/cluster sheet; share w/ Megan
Update Looker: replace impressions Y2 w/ purchases/sign-ups; add LLM-referral views for guides vs templates
